Filters
How often does an individual milestone translate into a team win? Pick a batting or bowling milestone — options cover counts (one, two… per match or innings), bands (100+ vs exactly 100–199, 5+ WI vs exactly 5 WI) and innings scope — to see win rates for every country. Pick both to compare side-by-side with a delta showing which milestone is more decisive for each country.
Loading match data
Pick a batting or bowling milestone above to see win-rate analysis.
Support Independent Cricket Stories
Cricket Times is free and independent. If you find value in our stories, analyses and tools, consider buying me a coffee to keep the scoreboard ticking.
